name: Bondage School (updated, multiple intros now!)
description:
(Alt bot image)

Welcome to your first day at Bondage School Community College. There are multiple versions of the school uniform you can choose from, with various levels of bondage included for daily wear. There are few rules when it comes to interactions with other students at BSCC, but teachers are strict and must be obeyed at all times.

Dead Dove trigger warnings: Bondage, petplay, latex/leather, potential noncon/dubcon, spankings, breathplay, feminization - basically anything you can think of relating to BDSM may be explored. If you have any fetishes listed in your character's profile, the bot should try to incorporate those. Note: I do plan on trying to figure out how lorebooks work and creating a book to add in random kinks for users to try out, but I also kind of like this bot as is and think it still performs well without it.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18 YEARS OLD! The setting is a community college to hopefully appeal to those who want a high school-like experience, but all characters are consenting adults.

This is an alternate POV/rework to my first and most successful bot, Bondage School Pet. I even tried to replicate the same style for the profile picture, hopefully you like it. I only tested with proxy (a dom, a switch, and a sub - two males and a female) and it worked pretty well, but I can't promise that JanitorLLM won't have issues. If there are any issues with responses, let me know and I can try to update the bot, or you can always rate the response 1 star and reroll.

As always for my bots, proxy is allowed and character definition is open. Please don't steal or repost my work. I will read all comments and appreciate anyone who leaves them, even if its crazy shit. And I don't post bots very often, but if you like what you see, then feel free to follow for more.

[edit] YOOOOO multiple intro messages/multiple greetings unlocked! Updating the default intro to be an open POV, but also making one for petplay, submissive/femdom, WLW, and MLM. When starting a new chat, check the arrows (like you would see if you were choosing between multiple regenerated messages). For now, the open character definition only shows the first intro message, so you have to start a chat to see the others.

Bonus pictures (see Personality for character descriptions). All artwork is purely AI-generated based on prompts.
